ground_truth.title: Hire Affordable Interior Designers in NYC | Compozure
ground_truth.main_content:
Hire an Interior Designer
Our Interior Designers are passionate about creating affordable luxury that fits your budget. When you hire interior designers through Compozure, we transform ordinary spaces into extraordinary environments that reflect your unique personality and lifestyle. From thoughtful space planning and custom furniture selection to innovative lighting solutions and carefully curated color palettes, our designers craft cohesive spaces.

Process
Looking to hire an interior designer? Within 24 hours of booking, you'll receive profiles of 1-3 carefully selected designers who align with your vision, budget, schedule and location. Once you've confirmed your match, we will connect you via email to schedule an intro call. After your intro call, your designer will send you a proposal and agreement of your project. 

Your deposit is fully refundable until you sign a formal agreement with your chosen designer (which occurs after your intro call).

Accessible Interior Designer Pricing
Our design services offer budget-conscious solutions with rates typically ranging from $100-$200 per hour, depending on project scope and designer expertise.

Your booking confirmation will include 1-3 expert profiles with their hourly rates. After selecting and meeting with your designer, they'll provide a Letter of Agreement outlining the project scope and either an hourly arrangement or fixed total cost. Billing occurs bi-weekly on Fridays for completed work.

Interior Design Expertise
• Space Planning
• Furniture, Fixture & Equipment Selection
• Mood Boards
• Kitchen & Bathroom Design
• Custom Millwork Design
• Visual Renderings
• Vendor & Contractor Management

Benefits
By using our interior design services, you unlock discounts to our other services. We provide $100-$200 off to friends you refer to us. We also provide $100-$300 off to you for any other services you use with us.

Pricing Plans
Whether you need to hire interior designer services for a single room or complete home transformation, all of our pricing plans are custom-designed to fit your budget and style preferences. We connect you with affordable interior designers who understand your vision and work within your parameters. We'll collaborate with you to create a personalized package that delivers exceptional design results while maintaining accessibility.

Meet Some of Our Interior Designers 

Alexandra Dow
Virtual & In-Person in New York
Specialities:
Modern, Minimal & Artistic
Experienced in architecture and interior design, I bring a wealth of expertise. I blend style, art and creativity into my designs.

Victoria Hessle
Virtual
Specialities:
Maximalism, Eclectic
I enjoy optimizing patterns and color in sophisticated styles. I challenge myself and my clients to look beyond their visions.

Wendy Ho
Virtual & In-Person in New York
Specialities:
Futuristic, Pop-cultural, Technology-Forward
My design bridges physical space with emerging technology, focusing on environments that are functional, visually compelling, and innovative.

Lucy Packard
Virtual & In-Person
Specialities:
Soho Home, Timeless English Country
My design is shaped by a decade designing Soho Houses globally, now creating thoughtful, layered homes.

Curated Interior Design for Every Budget
We serve New York City and surrounding areas within a 100-mile radius, including Long Island, Westchester County, Connecticut, and New Jersey. If you don't live in these areas, our designers can still support you with virtual consultations and remote design services. If you are unsure about coverage, email us at service@compozure.co.

Our affordable interior designers NYC bring expertise across every style and budget range. Whether you need a complete home makeover, single room refresh, or space planning consultation, we have affordable interior designers who understand how to maximize impact without breaking the bank. When you hire interior designer professionals through Compozure, they adapt to your specific vision—from color schemes and furniture selection to lighting design and space optimization.

With diverse design backgrounds and a commitment to affordability, Compozure makes it easy to hire interior designer talent in New York that's both accessible and transformative.

What Our Clients Say
"My friend came over this week and said "This apartment looks like you read Arch Digest religiously." It's just one of the many compliments I've received on the space - and there's still more to add! I thought it was a good way to sum up how incredible the space feels."
Amanda J, Studio Apartment Renter NYC
